[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000010 1
1 00101000 2
2 10010100 3
3 10001011 4
4 10101101 5
5 00000100 1
6 01101001 4
7 11000100 3
